current.summary: Designed capabilities.json pipeline for syllago-docs with field inventory, transparency model, and component architecture

activeWork.description: Planning and designing the capabilities.json pipeline to make provider capability data queryable and transparent on syllago-docs
activeWork.progress: Design phase complete: confidence policy clarified as internal-only, field inventory finalized (public: status, sources with uri/type/fetched_at, canonical_mappings, provider_extensions, last_changed_at for transparency), component architecture sketched (MetaBox infobox, CanonicalSupportTable for cross-reference, ProviderExtensions component). Sources and freshness indicators approved for user verification. Ready to plan and execute via /develop workflow.

recentDecisions: Confidence field stays internal: used for re-verification flags during development, never exposed in public docs or syllago behavior
Policy: if not in provider source/docs, feature is unsupported — absence of documentation is the answer, not ambiguity
sync-capabilities.ts reads from published GitHub release artifact (not local repos) for independence and cache-safety
Public data includes sources (uri, type, fetched_at) and last_changed_at for transparency — enables user verification and report-issue workflows
MetaBox component (top-right infobox) displays: last_changed_at for freshness, source count with links for verification, provider support count, report issue link
nextSteps: Use /develop skill to plan and execute syllago-docs capabilities pipeline as feature
Phase 1: _gencapabilities Go command in syllago CLI — reads docs/provider-formats/*.yaml and docs/spec/canonical-keys.yaml, outputs capabilities.json
Phase 2: sync-capabilities.ts in syllago-docs repo — fetches capabilities.json from GitHub release, writes src/content/capabilities/*.json and src/content/canonical-keys/*.json collections
Phase 3: src/content/config.ts — define Astro data collections with Zod schemas for queryable access
Phase 4: Build Astro components — MetaBox (metadata infobox), CanonicalSupportTable (providers × mechanism cross-reference), ProviderExtensions (extension list)
Phase 5: Auto-generate pages — canonical key pages with MetaBox, enriched provider pages, updated capability matrix
Close syllago-jtafb after docs pipeline wired to release

context.notes: Previous session completed all 50 capmon-change issues, resolved confidence values per new policy. This session designed the complete docs pipeline: _gencapabilities command, release artifact, sync script, Astro collections, and reusable components. All architectural decisions made. Ready to move to planning and execution in /develop.

previousSessions.summary: Finalized confidence policy, processed all 50 capmon-change issues, designed capabilities.json pipeline architecture
completedWork: All 50 initial capmon-change GitHub issues processed and closed across skills + rules/hooks/mcp/agents/commands
Confidence policy finalized: inferred (spec-compliance) → confirmed; unknown+supported:false → confirmed (absence of docs is the answer)
Designed full pipeline: _gencapabilities → capabilities.json release artifact → sync-capabilities.ts → Astro collections → programmatic tables
Field inventory finalized: public (status, sources, canonical_mappings, provider_extensions, last_changed_at), internal (confidence, generation_method, content_hash)
MetaBox component designed for transparent metadata (freshness, sources, provider coverage, issue reporting)
nextSteps: Use /develop to plan and execute as feature
Implement _gencapabilities Go command with release artifact
Implement sync-capabilities.ts for docs site data collection
